type.name: type_geo_project
type.wiki:
+section title={{name}} :navtop {{description wikify=true}} +row +col-8 +if property=showmap {{map listentries="true" message="" prefix=":nonavheading Project Locations" hideIfNoLocations=true entries="this,children,childrenof:type:type_map_folder" height=450px dontList="this" listInMap=true orderby=entryorder_up,name_up showBounds=false }} -if :heading Contents {{tabletree message="No project contents" simple="false" #maxHeight="500px" showSize=false showCreateDate=false showDate=false orderby=entryorder_up ascending=true}} -col +col-4 {{field name="project_type" row.label="Project Type:" }} {{field name="project_status" row.label="Project Status:" }}
+center {{image inherited="false" showCaption=true multiples=true popup=true message="" width="80%" useThumbnail="true" }} -center :vspace 1em +div style="max-height:80vh;overflow-y:auto;" {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="content.license" includeTitle=false}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="project_pi" includeTitle=true}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="project_funding" includeTitle=true}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="dif.usecontraints,content.citation" includeTitle=true}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="project_person" includeTitle=true}} {{properties message="" inherited="true" metadata.types="enum_tag" includeTitle=true}} -div -center -col -row :vspace 1em +if property=show_type_summary ---- :vspace 1em :heading Data Type Summary +center {{typecount addPageSearch=true doColor=false message="No data available" ancestor="${this}" addAncestorToSearchLink=true addSearchLink=true}} -center -if +if property=show_search ---- :vspace 1em :heading Search Project {{display_entrylist startWithAny=true startWithAny=true addAnyType=true addAllTypes=true showEntryType=true showAncestor=true ancestor=this metadataTypes="" entryTypes="super:type_core_base,type_data_file,type_geo_site,super:type_document,group,type_map_folder,type_display_children" orderByTypes="name,relevant,createdate,date,size" displayTypes="list,images,map,display" includeNonImages=false }} -if ---- :vspace 1em :heading Project Information {{information showDetails="true" showTitle="false" details="true"}} -section
